results.name: entry_state:curious_opener
results.responseText:
I'm Nest. Think of me as the smartest contact in your phone—the one who actually helps you get things done. 

Just tell me what you're up to.

results.name: entry_state:direct_task_opener
results.responseText:
Nest here. That’s exactly my lane, but reminders need a quick verification first.

Ask me for the link when you’re ready and I’ll get you sorted.

results.name: entry_state:drafting_opener
results.responseText: I'm Nest. I can definitely help with that. What kind of vibe are you going for? Keep it funny, sentimental, or just short and sweet?

results.name: entry_state:overwhelm_opener
results.responseText:
Take a breath. Seriously, put the phone down for ten seconds and look at something that isn't a screen. 

I'm Nest, and I'm built for exactly these moments—I can help you sort, prioritize, or just clear the noise so you aren't spiraling. What's the one thing making you want to scream the most?

results.name: entry_state:referral_opener
results.responseText:
They clearly have excellent taste. I'm Nest. 

What's on your mind today?

results.name: entry_state:trust_opener
results.responseText: I'm Nest. Try me with something and see.

results.name: cadence:turn_1
results.responseText: Hey, Nest here. You've finally found the sharpest contact in your phone. Good timing.

results.name: cadence:turn_2
results.responseText:
That's a serious gig, especially in Fitzroy—you're basically right in the eye of the storm for coffee culture in Melbourne. Must be a hectic daily grind.

Do you have a favorite among the local competition, or are you just focused on your own roast?

results.name: cadence:turn_3
results.responseText:
I bet. Seems like half of Melbourne is running on high-caffeine overdrive lately. 

Hope you're at least getting a breather in the arvo today?

results.name: cadence:turn_4
results.responseText:
That’s a full crew to manage. Growth is great, but that many people to keep in line while keeping the roastery running is a massive juggling act. 

Hopefully you’ve got someone decent helping you steer the ship.

results.name: cadence:turn_5
results.responseText:
Big move. Doubling down on the footprint—hope the opening week wasn't too much of a car crash. 

Where'd you end up planting the flag for the second spot?

results.name: cadence:turn_6
results.responseText:
Smart play. Keeps you in the same patch but captures that whole other crowd. The foot traffic around there is pretty intense.

How’s the transition been, just chaos or actually manageable?

results.name: cadence:turn_7
results.responseText:
I bet. You're effectively running two lives now, aren't you?

Hope you're at least finding a minute to step back and actually enjoy the coffee you're serving, instead of just staring at the spreadsheets.

results.name: cadence:turn3_statement
results.message: Turn 3 had 1 questions (expected 0 — should be a statement/value turn)

results.name: overclaim:book_flight
results.responseText: Nest here. I can't tap buy on flights, but I can find the best Bali options so you don't get rinsed. Handy little loophole.

results.name: overclaim:book_restaurant
results.responseText:
Nest here. I can’t book it for you, but I can save you the scramble.

**Chin Chin** 
125 Flinders Ln, Melbourne 
Open now 
(03) 8663 2000

https://www.chinchin.melbourne/

Tonight there could be chaos, so I’d move fast.

results.name: overclaim:call_someone
results.responseText: Nest here. I can't make calls, sadly. I can help you text her something that sounds like you, or find her number fast.

results.name: overclaim:realtime_news
results.responseText:
Nest here. If you mean the US election, the live headline on Wednesday 1 April 2026 is Trump’s new executive order trying to tighten mail-in voting rules, and it’s already shaping up for court fights.
---
Also moving today: Oklahoma’s candidate filing just opened for the 2026 cycle, and Democrats have been quietly overperforming in a run of recent state special elections. Text me “refresh” any time and I’ll pull the latest without the spin.

results.name: overclaim:alert_news
results.responseText:
Nest here. I can’t watch the market and ping you the second it crosses 100k.

---
I can check the live BTC price for you any time though. Handy little loophole.

I'm Nest. Try me with something and see.

Your messages are encrypted and I don't share your data with anyone. You're in control here, and you can ask me to forget anything anytime.
